title: MathPaperReview
description: An AI-evaluated math paper. All metadata fields come from arxiv; the only human-uploaded content is ai_proof_review.

arxiv_categories.description: At least one math.* category required; non-math papers are out of scope.

ai_proof_review.description: Long-form AI evaluation of the paper's proof. Markdown + LaTeX (KaTeX delimiters) supported.

impact_if_true.description: Discrete tier. max = Field-defining (Perelman / Wiles class); high = changes the field; medium = substantial; low = incremental; minimal = niche micro-step.

proof_correctness.description: Discrete tier from max → minimal. Five buckets only: LLMs cannot calibrate finer than this. max = solid as a one-pass read; minimal = almost certainly not.
